'''Niles Ferrier's wraith''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Defel/Legends|Defel]] who worked with the [[Niles Ferrier|ship thief]]. Ferrier simply referred to him as "'''wraith'''".

==Biography==
The Defel was able to sneak onto the [[Lady Luck/Legends|''Lady Luck'']] and place two tracking devices, one on the hull and one inside the ship where it would not be found. Ferrier was thus able to follow [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] to [[Pantolomin/Legends|Pantolomin]] and help [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] obtain the location of the [[Katana fleet]].

Ferrier's wraith was present at the first meeting of the [[Smugglers' Alliance]] when [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] [[Reynol Kosk|Kosk]] and his men attacked. The Defel was standing against a wall ready to hit the Imperials when they came in. (This would later help [[Samuel Tomas Gillespee|Gillespee]] figure out that Ferrier and the wraith already knew the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] would attack).

Later, the wraith sneaked into the ''[[Wild Karrde]]'' to plant evidence that [[Talon Karrde]] had hired Kosk and his men, but which ultimately proved Ferrier to be the traitor amongst the smugglers. When Ferrier ran, he left the wraith behind, a prisoner of the Smuggler's Alliance.
